name: How to add your business to wellness.com
description: Learn how to increase your online presence and attract potential customers by adding your business profile to wellness.com. Follow our step-by-step guide now.
main_title: How to add your business to wellness.com
richtext:
What is Wellness.com and why is it important?

Wellness.com is an online directory of health and wellness professionals and businesses that aims to connect people with trusted practitioners. If you are a health and wellness practitioner or business looking to get listed on Wellness.com is the right place.

‍

Step-by-step guide to add your business to Wellness.com

‍

  1. Go to the Wellness.com homepage: Start by going to the Wellness.com homepage at https://www.wellness.com.

‍

  1. Use the navigation bar at the top of the page with options for different types of wellness professionals and services.

‍

  1. Choose the appropriate category: Click on the category that best fits your profession or service, such as "Cardiologist", "Chiropractors", "Fitness Centers", "Hospitals", or "Nutritionists".

‍

  1. Click "Add Listing": On the category page, you will see a button that says "Add Listing" at the top right corner of the page. Click on it to start the registration process.

‍

  1. Search for the Doctor name or Business name from the search field.

‍

  1. If you can’t find the name or business from the list. You can simply click 'Create a New Profile' located above.

‍

  1. Complete your profile information, If you found it from the list. 

‍

  1. If you are creating a new profile, you will need to provide the basic provider’s informations, business informations

‍

  1. Additionally, it is possible to include information about your business, such as operating hours, duration of medical practice, accepted payment methods, and certifications.

‍

  1. Choose a plan and Click ‘Activate’: Wellness.com offers a different membership package, including a professional directory, multiple directories and premium plans that offer additional features and benefits. Choose the package that best suits your needs and budget.

‍

  1. Click ‘Next’ once you have confirmed your Authenticity by providing your full name, email address, contact number and the relationship to the provider.

‍

  1. Pay for your membership: If you choose a premium package, you will need to pay for your membership. You can do this online using a credit card or PayPal.

‍

  1. Confirm your listing: Once you have completed your registration and paid for your membership, your listing will be submitted for approval. Wellness.com will review your listing to ensure that it meets their guidelines, and you will receive an email confirmation once your listing has been approved.

‍

  1. Optimize your listing: Once your listing is live, you can optimize it by adding more information about your business or practice, such as photos, reviews, and testimonials. You can also update your profile information or upgrade your plan at any time.

‍

Getting listed on Wellness.com can help you reach a wider audience and connect with potential clients. Follow these steps to create your listing and start building your online presence today!

‍
